summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Loyalty Program feature for Espace Maxo. All backend endpoints and frontend components working correctly.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: GET /api/loyalty/{phone} returns proper structure for new customer (exists: false, 0 points, 0 free_games, games_until_free: 10)
✅ Backend: GET /api/loyalty/{phone} cleans phone number with +229 prefix
✅ Backend: GET /api/loyalty/{phone} cleans phone number with spaces
✅ Backend: POST /api/loyalty/add-points returns 404 for non-existent booking
✅ Backend: POST /api/loyalty/add-points returns 400 for unpaid booking
✅ Backend: GET /api/admin/loyalty/accounts with valid token returns accounts list with stats
✅ Backend: POST /api/loyalty/redeem returns 404 for non-existent account
✅ Frontend: LoyaltyCard NOT shown when phone has less than 10 digits
✅ Frontend: LoyaltyCard displayed when 10-digit phone entered on booking page
✅ Frontend: LoyaltyCard shows 'Nouveau client? Gagnez 1 point par partie!' message for new customers
✅ Frontend: LoyaltyCard shows '10 points = 1 partie gratuite' info
✅ Frontend: Admin dashboard has 'Réservations' and 'Fidélité' tabs
✅ Frontend: Fidélité tab shows 'Membres Fidélité (0)' title
✅ Frontend: Fidélité tab shows empty state message 'Aucun membre fidélité pour le moment'
✅ Frontend: Fidélité tab shows explanation 'Les clients reçoivent 1 point par partie jouée. 10 points = 1 partie gratuite!'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Loyalty program is fully functional. Points are added automatically after payment verification. Admin can view loyalty accounts in the Fidélité tab. Currently no loyalty members exist since no payments have been completed in test environment. The loyalty card appears on the booking page when a valid 10-digit phone number is entered.
